mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.volunteer_id as volunteerId, c.target_type as targetType, c.target_id as targetId, c.content, c.create_time as createdAt, c.parent_id as parentId, v.username as userName, v.avatar as avatar, CASE WHEN c.target_type = '活动' THEN a.title WHEN c.target_type = '帖子' THEN p.title END as postTitle FROM comment c LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON c.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN activity a ON c.target_type = '活动' AND c.target_id = a.id LEFT JOIN forum_post p ON c.target_type = '帖子' AND c.target_id = p.id ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT c.id, c.volunteer_id as volunteerId, c.target_type as targetType, c.target_id as targetId, c.content, c.create_time as createdAt, c.parent_id as parentId, v.username as userName, v.avatar as avatar, COALESCE(c.likes, 0) as likes, CASE WHEN #{volunteerId} IS NOT NULL AND c.liked_by IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR), c.liked_by COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as liked, CASE WHEN c.target_type = '活动' THEN a.title WHEN c.target_type = '帖子' THEN p.title END as postTitle FROM comment c LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON c.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN activity a ON c.target_type = '活动' AND c.target_id = a.id LEFT JOIN forum_post p ON c.target_type = '帖子' AND c.target_id = p.id WHERE c.target_type = #{targetType} AND c.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY c.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (volunteer_id, target_type, target_id, content, parent_id) VALUES (#{volunteerId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{parentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE comment SET likes = COALESCE(likes, 0) + 1, liked_by = CASE WHEN liked_by IS NULL OR liked_by = '' THEN CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR) ELSE CONCAT(liked_by, ',', CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR)) END WHERE id = #{commentId} AND (liked_by IS NULL OR FIND_IN_SET(CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR), liked_by COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci) = 0)

UPDATE comment SET likes = GREATEST(COALESCE(likes, 0) - 1, 0), liked_by = CASE WHEN liked_by = CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR) THEN NULL WHEN liked_by LIKE CONCAT(CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR), ',%') THEN SUBSTRING(liked_by, LENGTH(CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR)) + 2) WHEN liked_by LIKE CONCAT('%,', CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR)) THEN SUBSTRING(liked_by, 1, LENGTH(liked_by) - LENGTH(CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR)) - 1) WHEN liked_by LIKE CONCAT('%,', CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR), ',%') THEN REPLACE(liked_by, CONCAT(',', CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR), ','), ',') ELSE liked_by END WHERE id = #{commentId} AND liked_by IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(CAST(#{volunteerId} AS CHAR), liked_by COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci) > 0
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.volunteer_id as volunteerId, c.target_type as targetType, c.target_id as targetId, c.content, c.create_time as createdAt, c.parent_id as parentId, v.username as userName, v.avatar as avatar, COALESCE(c.likes, 0) as likes, CASE WHEN c.target_type = '活动' THEN a.title WHEN c.target_type = '帖子' THEN p.title END as postTitle FROM comment c LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON c.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN activity a ON c.target_type = '活动' AND c.target_id = a.id LEFT JOIN forum_post p ON c.target_type = '帖子' AND c.target_id = p.id WHERE c.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
